payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT s.Major, s.Age FROM Student s WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Has_Pet hp JOIN Pets p ON hp.PetID = p.PetID WHERE hp.StuID = s.StuID AND LOWER(p.PetType) = 'cat');"}
